login.title: Kratox.io
login.description: Enter your credentials to access your tenant dashboard.

login.unknownError: An unknown error occurred during login.
login.resetSuccess: Password reset successfully! Please log in with your new password.
login.lockedOut: Account locked. Try again in {{seconds}} seconds.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a recovery code.

verifyCode.title: Verify Code
verifyCode.resendSuccess: A new code has been sent to your email.
verifyCode.networkError: Network Error: Could not connect to the server.

resetPassword.title: New Password
resetPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.passwordMaxLength: Password must be at most 128 characters.

resetPassword.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
resetPassword.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number.
resetPassword.passwordSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character (!@#$%^&* etc.).

register.title: Create Account
register.description: Fill in the details below to create your account.
register.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters.
register.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 100 characters.
register.phoneMinLength: Phone number must be at least 10 characters.
register.phoneMaxLength: Phone number must be at most 20 characters.
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.passwordMaxLength: Password must be at most 128 characters.
register.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
register.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
register.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number.
register.passwordSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character (!@#$%^&* etc.).
register.emailExists: A user with this email already exists.
register.networkError: Network Error: Could not connect to the server.
register.unknownError: An unknown error occurred during registration.
register.success: Account created successfully! Redirecting to login...

users.title: Manage Users
users.description: Create, edit, and manage users across all tenants.

form.editDescription: Update the user's details. Leave the password field blank to keep it unchanged.
form.createDescription: Fill in the form to create a new user. Admins are automatically assigned to the 'Kratox.io Corp' tenant.
form.errorGroupsDesc: Could not load Zabbix Host Groups.

deleteDialog.title: Are you absolutely sure?
deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the user

users.noUsersFound: No users found for this filter.

tenants.title: Manage Tenants
tenants.description: Create and view all tenants on the platform. You can also configure tenant-specific settings like the Probe API URL here.

createDialog.title: Create New Tenant
createDialog.description: Add a new tenant to the platform.

blocklists.title: Manage Blocklist Feeds
blocklists.description: Create and manage standard blocklists that tenants can subscribe to.

createDialog.title: Create Blocklist Feed
createDialog.description: Manage a list of domains that tenants can subscribe to. Enter one domain per line.

form.name: Name
form.placeholderDesc: A short description of the list

automation.templatesDescription: Create and manage script-based automation templates that clients can activate.
automation.blocksDescription: Define the criteria and actions that clients can use to build their old automation rules.

ips.title: Blocked IP Addresses
ips.description: List of IPs being blocked for your tenant.
ips.empty: No IP addresses are currently blocked.

feeds.title: Threat Intelligence Feeds
feeds.description: Subscribe to managed blocklists for automatic protection against known threats.

edit.title: Edit Blocked Domain/IP
edit.description: Modify the blocked domain or IP address below.

analysis.textDescription: Paste a log, email, or report.
analysis.noNewDomains: No new, unblocked domains were found.
analysis.couldNotRead: Could not read the selected file.

manual.title: Manually Add Domain/IP
manual.description: Enter a domain or IP to block it.
manual.label: Domain/IP Name

suggestions.title: AI Suggested Domains
suggestions.description: These domains were found in your analysis and are not yet on the blocklist.
suggestions.itemsAdded: {{count}} items have been added to the blocklist.

blockedList.title: Blocked Domains
blockedList.description: List of domains being blocked for your tenant.
blockedList.clearAllSuccess: All items have been successfully removed.
blockedList.clearAllConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to remove all manually blocked domains? This action cannot be undone.

link.deleteToCreateNew: Delete a link to create a new one

modal.title: Generate Public Download Link
modal.description: You can generate a secure public link to download your blocklist. Anyone with this link will be able to download the list.
modal.formatHelp: The generated link will be fixed to this format.

delete.title: Delete Link?
delete.description: This action cannot be undone. The download link will be permanently deleted and will no longer work.

regenerate.title: Regenerate Link?
regenerate.description: This will generate a new token for this configuration. The old link will immediately become invalid.
regenerate.success: Link regenerated successfully. Old link is invalid.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.description: Update your personal information. Your email is <1>{{email}}</1>.
profile.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
profile.passwordChangeDescription: To change your password, enter a new one below. Otherwise, leave these fields blank.
profile.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

footer.description: Security, control, and compliance for your network infrastructure.

hero.subtitle: Simplify the management of court-ordered blocklists and protect your infrastructure with preventative blocking, legal compliance, and network security.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: A complete platform of tools to ensure the security and compliance of your operation.

dnsBlocking.title: Global DNS Blocking
dnsBlocking.desc: Real-time interception and redirection of DNS requests, ensuring immediate compliance with court orders.

ipFiltering.title: IP Filtering
ipFiltering.desc: Efficient traffic blocking for malicious or unauthorized IPs directly at your network edge.

compliance.title: Compliance Automation
compliance.desc: Automate the blocking process required by judicial bodies, avoiding fines and sanctions.

audit.title: Dynamic Integration
audit.desc: Integrate your DNS servers and BGP edge routers with our platform to keep your blocklists dynamically updated.

cta.title: Ready to take control?
cta.subtitle: Ensure security and compliance automatically for your infrastructure.

whyImportant.title: Why is Preventive Blocking Crucial?
whyImportant.subtitle: In the current cybersecurity and regulation landscape, internet providers and companies face growing challenges. Kratox.io simplifies this complexity.

legal.title: Legal Compliance
legal.desc: Quickly meet court orders to block illegal sites and services (piracy, unregulated gambling, etc.) without impacting your operation.

security.title: Network Security
security.desc: Prevent infected devices on your network from communicating with command and control (C2) servers through effective DNS blocking.

integrity.title: Infrastructure Integrity
integrity.desc: Protect your network by blocking prohibited or unwanted IP addresses and domains.

docs.title: Documentation and Resources
docs.subtitle: Access our complete guides to integrate Kratox.io into your existing infrastructure, whether MikroTik, Cisco, Juniper, or Linux.

startGuide.title: Start Guide
startGuide.desc: Step by step to set up your account and initial blocks.

techDocs.title: Technical Documentation
techDocs.desc: Technical details about integrations and advanced configurations.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Need help? Get in touch with us.

form.name: Name
form.successDesc: We will be in touch soon.
form.errorDesc: Try again later or contact via WhatsApp.
